title: Mortgage Payment Calculator Monthly - Free Estimate
description: Free monthly mortgage payment calculator. Estimate your home loan payment including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance. Plan your home purchase today.
keywords: mortgage payment calculator monthly, home loan calculator, mortgage estimate, house payment calculator, monthly mortgage payment
intro: Calculate your estimated monthly mortgage payment based on loan amount, interest rate, and term. Includes breakdown of principal and interest.

faq.q: How is monthly mortgage payment calculated?
faq.a: Monthly payment = P[r(1+r)^n]/[(1+r)^n-1], where P is principal, r is monthly interest rate, and n is number of payments.

faq.q: What is included in a mortgage payment?
faq.a: A typical mortgage payment includes principal, interest, property taxes, and homeowner's insurance (PITI).

faq.q: How much house can I afford?
faq.a: A common rule is that your monthly mortgage payment should not exceed 28% of your gross monthly income.
